description: Symfony bundle extension: config tree definition, config validation, service loading, and framework config prepend (messenger, doctrine).

files.responsibility: Symfony DI extension — prepends messenger/doctrine config, processes bundle configuration into container parameters, loads services.php.
Defines the full configuration tree for agent_loop: runtime mode, streaming, LLM defaults, storage backends, tool execution, commands, events, checkpoints, retention.

relatedRootFile.responsibility: Bundle entry point — registers AgentLoopExtension as the container extension.
